description: Calibration gold-set for the /recall-similar primitive vector index. 22 queries across 7 categories validate Recall@5, MRR, and Precision@5 against the live primitive catalog at lib/primitives/definitions/. All expected ids are drawn directly from lib/primitives/definitions/_catalog.generated.ts (verified 2026-05-04) and the drivers/ folder; no id is inferred from a filename.

spawnContract.expectedJsonShape: { results: Array<{ id: string, score: number, displayName?: string, category?: string, gpuCost?: string }> }
spawnContract.exitCode: 0 = ok; non-zero = infrastructure failure (treated as runner error, not query failure)

cases.rationale: Exact substring match on 'bloom' against name and id. BM25 must rank bloom and fastBloom first. exponentialBloom (display 'Optical Bloom'), halation, halationBloomMatrix share the bloom/glow taxonomy.
Single canonical primitive. Mirror and polar share the symmetric-fold taxonomy but are not name matches.

Six primitives have 'voronoi' in id or name. stippler (display 'Voronoi Stippler') and stars (display 'Voronoi Stars 1') match on name. powerDiagram and centroidalPartition are voronoi-family by mathematical relation.
mosaic is the canonical id. glyphMosaicEngine is the only other 'mosaic' substring. halftone and stipple share the tiled-discrete-element taxonomy.

adjust display name is 'Color Correction'. primaryGrading display 'Primary Color Grading'. ascCdl display 'Primary Wheels (CDL)'. The color-grading cluster is 10 primitives wide; top-3 must be the canonical grading nodes.
Eight primitives have 'particle' in id. fireflies and liquidParticles are particle-class without the 'particle' prefix. Top-3 should be the core emit/render/forces triad.
Five primitives have 'noise' in id. fbm (display 'Fractal Distort') is FBM noise. filmGrain (display 'Procedural Grain') is noise-based. spiralNoise (display 'Dusty Nebula') is noise-class.
hueVsSat (display 'Hue vs. Saturation') is the canonical hue control. adjust (Color Correction) carries hue/saturation/brightness sliders. colorBalance is shadow/mid/highlight hue shift.

bokeh, hexBokeh, animatedBokeh are the bokeh cluster. tiltShift (display 'Tilt-Shift Miniature') is canonical DOF. depthlessDof (display 'Depthless DOF') names it directly. progressiveBlur display is 'Depth Blur'.
Two anamorphic primitives plus lensFlare. bloom carries Anamorphic H / Anamorphic V shape options per the catalog audit. lightLeak is flare-adjacent.

No primitive contains the literal substring 'starry'. starsBackground, stars (Voronoi Stars 1), cosmos, voronoiStars, starLight, starV2 contain 'star'. fireflies/fireflySwarm/sparkle are the night-sky semantic neighborhood. Dense embedding required for true synonym recall.
Direct: smoke, smokeTrail. wisps display name is 'Smoke Tendrils' — name-token match, not id-substring. fog/horizonFog/glassFog/inkInWater are atmospheric-volume neighbors.
Four direct 'glass' matches. refractionSheet is the optical-glass semantic neighbor.
Substring 'rain' hits rain, rainDrops, cometRain, matrixRain. waterDrops/waterDropsPhysics are the precipitation neighborhood. Dense should bridge 'rainy' to all of these.
Designer-vocabulary query. hoverDriver and mouseDriver are the interactivity sources. kaleidoscope and swirl have rotation axes. cursorSpotlight is hover-reactive.
Two audio-source primitives. oscillatorBank and waveDriver are rhythmic signal generators. bloom is a common audio-reactive target due to its intensity/threshold uniforms.
scrollDriver is the canonical signal source. depthParallax and parallaxVolumeWarp are parallax effects. depthZoom and depthGradientBlur are scroll-driven depth effects.

/og-node-architecture Phase 0 duplicate-prevention query. The complete voronoi mathematical space in this catalog. cellColony (display 'Cell Colony') is cellular by name. powerDiagram is generalized voronoi (weighted).

Phase 0 query that matches the use-cases doc verbatim. domainWarping is the explicit primitive. fbm display 'Fractal Distort'. fbmTerrain is the ports/ FBM primitive. noisefill, noise, flowNoise, waveletNoise are the noise neighborhood.

sdf_shape display name is 'Procedural 3D' — the canonical raymarcher. apollonianGasket is fractal-SDF raymarched. sdfMorph, heartSdf, twodsdf (Vector Shape) are 2D SDF primitives. morphingSphere is implicit-surface raymarched.
Compound technical term. anisotropicHighlight is the exact name. anisotropicEtch shares the prefix. iridescentSheen, rimLight, fresnelEdge are specular-shading neighbors.
Empty query must error or return zero results. This case is marked as accepting any non-crash behavior (no expected ids). The runner does not penalize for missing hits when expectedInTop3 is empty.
